name: Big Brown Bus Co
recent_news: Yelp listing shows 'CLOSED' as of January 2026 update; Kompass listing references 1621 Valeria St, Austin (78704). No evidence of an active school-bus contracting operation; appears to have been a charter/tour bus business now ceased.
fit_notes: NOT a viable tuck-in target: Yelp marks the business as CLOSED and there is no evidence of active school-bus contracting in the Austin metro. Deprioritize.

name: Aron's School Bus Svc
recent_news: Registered in Texas as Aron's School Bus Service, LLC (Bizapedia listing); operates from 868 W Little York Rd, Houston (77091). Very limited public footprint — no website, no district contract references, no FMCSA snapshot surfaced. No M&A or news activity.
fit_notes: Sub-scale single-yard Houston operator with virtually no digital footprint. If genuinely an active small school-bus contractor, could be a micro-tuck-in into a Houston-area Summit yard, but value is likely <$1M revenue. Diligence requires phone/in-person confirmation.

name: Ber Ber Transport LLC
districts_or_customers: Public school regions, charter schools, Catholic schools, private schools in northern NJ (Essex County area)
recent_news: FMCSA SAFER (USDOT 4416787) shows ACTIVE intrastate-only (non-hazmat) status with 8 power units and 7 drivers; last MCS-150 filed 05/29/2025; 0 crashes/0 inspections in last 24 months. Company website (goberber.com) is dated 2023, suggesting recent formation. Member of Suburban Essex (Maplewood) chamber of commerce.
fit_notes: Small (~8 buses) but legitimate northern-NJ school bus contractor serving Essex County districts and private/Catholic schools. Newer entity (2023) so likely founder-owned; succession not driven by age but could be open to a partnership given small scale and capital needs. Bolt-on candidate for a NJ Summit yard, though revenue is modest (~$1-2.5M).

name: Southwest Student Trnsprtn
recent_news: No verifiable public footprint — no website, no district contract references, no FMCSA record surfaced under this name. McKinney ISD's primary school-bus contractor is Durham School Services (Summit/National Express platform), so this entity is not the prime district contractor. Possible small charter/private-school operator at 201 1/2 E Virginia St, McKinney.
fit_notes: Cannot confirm this is an active independent school-bus contractor; McKinney ISD itself contracts to Durham (Summit platform). At ~15 employees and no web presence, likely sub-scale private-school or activity transport. Low-priority tuck-in candidate pending direct verification.

name: Lake Area Bus
recent_news: Directory listings identify the entity as 'Lake Area Bus Dial A Ride' at 3400 Spring St NE, Minneapolis 55413, phone (651) 644-8876. Operates as a dial-a-ride/paratransit service, not a yellow-bus school transportation contractor. No FMCSA passenger-carrier school-bus footprint surfaced.
fit_notes: NOT a school-bus tuck-in target — appears to be a dial-a-ride / demand-response transit service (potentially NEMT-adjacent), not a yellow-bus contractor. Excluded from Summit's core acquisition lens; only marginal interest if Summit is expanding into NEMT/special-needs door-to-door.
